allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
EMI schedule, payments, penalties, EOD, and loan closure completed

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git add Dockerfile render.yaml src/main/resources/application-prod.properties && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Add Docker and Render deployment configuration

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)" && git push origin credit_assessments)

Bash(git add src/main/resources/data.sql src/main/resources/application-prod.properties && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Add master data seed and auto-init on startup

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)" && git push origin credit_assessments)

Bash(git add src/main/resources/ && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Add master data seed and auto-init on startup

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)" && git push origin credit_assessments)

Bash(git add src/main/java/com/moneymoment/lending/master/MasterService.java src/main/java/com/moneymoment/lending/master/MasterController.java && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Add roles APIs to master controller

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)" && git push origin credit_assessments)
